summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that she published her first op-ed in the New York Times. The op-ed, titled 'The Ivory Tower Can't Keep Ignoring Tech,' argues that academia needs to engage more seriously with technology and algorithms. The post itself contains minimal content beyond the announcement and link to the full piece.
key_points: O'Neil published her first op-ed in the New York Times
The op-ed calls on academia to stop ignoring the tech industry and its algorithmic impacts
This represents a milestone in bringing her algorithmic accountability message to mainstream audiences
money_quotes: The Ivory Tower Can't Keep Ignoring Tech
key_insight: Academia has a responsibility to critically engage with the tech industry and its algorithms rather than remaining detached in the ivory tower.
